heroHeadline: DHS Shutdown Hits Day 46 — Congress on Recess; Mullin Replaces Noem as DHS Secretary
heroSubtitle: No resolution expected until April 13; 14 deaths in ICE custody in 2026 including Jose Guadalupe Ramos-Solano at Adelanto (March 25); 17 migrants flown to CECOT despite court TRO on March 31; Mass Deportation Coalition calls for 'Phase II' worksite enforcement; Judge Gee bars ICE from re-detaining cognitively disabled deported man
footerNote: Data sourced from DHS, ICE official records, ACLU, HRW, DHS OIG, TRAC Reports, Detention Watch Network, court records, and Congressional records
